description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet with a predominantly green exterior featuring darker green camouflage-like patterns. The front face includes a large, dark display screen set within a rectangular bezel, and a control panel equipped with two red-topped joysticks and several black buttons, suggesting two-player capability. Below the control panel, a coin slot is visible, indicating the cabinet's use in coin-operated gaming environments. The cabinet's structure is angular, with a slanted marquee area above the screen and a deep, boxy base for stability. The side panels are decorated with subtle, abstract green patterns but lack any distinct artwork or branding. The back of the cabinet is plain and dark, with no visible access panels or ventilation grilles.
description: A green upright arcade game cabinet with camouflage-like patterns, dual joysticks, multiple buttons, and a coin slot on the front. The cabinet features a large dark screen and a plain, patterned exterior.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the cabinet's angular profile and green patterned side panel with no distinct artwork.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the screen, two red-topped joysticks, multiple buttons, and a visible coin slot below the control panel.
description_view_2: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same green patterned panel and visible control panel edge.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, dark back panel with no visible features or access points.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two red-topped joysticks and multiple black buttons arranged for two-player side-by-side play; no visible markings or color schemes beyond the controls themselves.
